summary: Iteration 15 Testing Complete - Bug fixes verified: Chat widget drag functionality and Map database update. Both reported bugs are now fixed and working correctly.

issues: Minor HTML nesting warning: Badge component (div) nested inside p tag - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Chat widget drag implementation uses useRef-based handlers with stable function references (mouseMoveRef, mouseUpRef) - good pattern
didDrag ref correctly prevents click from firing after drag gesture
Map API uses Overpass API with expanded tags for comprehensive results
6-hour cache with refresh=true bypass parameter implemented correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs from user report are fixed: 1) Chat widget is now draggable - uses cursor-grab class and mousedown/mousemove/mouseup handlers. Position changed from (1821,1040) to (1521,840) during test. 2) Map search returns many results - Dallas TX search returned 104 veterinarians. Pet-Friendly category button exists. Refresh button appears after search.

chat_widget_drag.evidence: Chat button has cursor-grab class, drag test moved widget 300px horizontally and 200px vertically
chat_widget_drag.implementation: useRef-based drag handlers at lines 489-517 in ChatWidget.js

map_database_outdated.implementation: Expanded Overpass API tags in places.py, 500 result limit, 6hr cache with refresh bypass

chat_widget.drag_functionality: WORKING - cursor-grab class present, position changes on drag

map_page.category_buttons: ALL PRESENT - vet, pet_store, dog_park, groomer, park, pet_friendly
